_publications._publicationTitle: Immune profiling of NF1-associated tumors reveals histologic subtype distinctions and heterogeneity: implications for immunotherapy.

_contextSnippet: In general, MPNST and nodular histology benign tumors displayed higher average HLA-A/B/C staining scores, while diffuse and plexiform neurofibromas exhibited lower average scores
details: Successfully demonstrated wide ranges of HLA-A/B/C staining scores (0-300 range) in NF1-associated tumors by immunohistochemistry, with MPNST and nodular histology tumors showing higher average scores
